svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.6"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="gwyfPVto3OYyjQZAuqhD"> <mxGraphModel dx="872" dy="473" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" background="none" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml MovieTicketBooking_ClassDiagram

' ===== STYLE =====
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontSize 12
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam classBorderColor #333333
skinparam arrowColor #333333
skinparam stereotypeCBackgroundColor #ADD8E6

' ===== ENTITIES =====

class Movie <<Entity>> {
 - id: Long
 - title: String
 - description: String
 - durationMinutes: Integer
 - genre: String
 - language: String
 - releaseDate: LocalDate
 - rating: String
 - posterUrl: String
 - isActive: Boolean
 - version: Long
}

class Theater <<Entity>> {
 - id: Long
 - name: String
 - address: String
 - city: String
 - state: String
 - pincode: String
 - contactNumber: String
 - isActive: Boolean
 - version: Long
}

class Screen <<Entity>> {
 - id: Long
 - screenNumber: Integer
 - totalSeats: Integer
 - totalRows: Integer
 - seatsPerRow: Integer
 - screenType: ScreenType
 - isActive: Boolean
 - version: Long
}

class Seat <<Entity>> {
 - id: Long
 - rowLabel: String
 - seatNumber: Integer
 - category: SeatCategory
 - isAvailable: Boolean
 + getSeatIdentifier(): String
}

class Show <<Entity>> {
 - id: Long
 - showDate: LocalDate
 - startTime: LocalTime
 - endTime: LocalTime
 - basePrice: BigDecimal
 - availableSeats: Integer
 - isActive: Boolean
 - version: Long
}

class ShowSeat <<Entity>> {
 - id: Long
 - status: SeatStatus
 - price: BigDecimal
 - version: Long
}

class User <<Entity>> {
 - id: Long
 - firstName: String
 - lastName: String
 - email: String
 - phoneNumber: String
 - passwordHash: String
 - role: UserRole
 - isActive: Boolean
 - version: Long
 + getFullName(): String
}

class Booking <<Entity>> {
 - id: Long
 - bookingNumber: String
 - numberOfSeats: Integer
 - totalAmount: BigDecimal
 - discountAmount: BigDecimal
 - finalAmount: BigDecimal
 - status: BookingStatus
 - bookingTime: LocalDateTime
 - paymentTime: LocalDateTime
 - cancellationTime: LocalDateTime
 - cancellationReason: String
 - version: Long
}

class Payment <<Entity>> {
 - id: Long
 - transactionId: String
 - amount: BigDecimal
 - paymentMethod: PaymentMethod
 - status: PaymentStatus
 - initiatedAt: LocalDateTime
 - completedAt: LocalDateTime
 - failureReason: String
 - version: Long
}

' ===== ENUMERATIONS =====

enum ScreenType {
 STANDARD
 IMAX
 DOLBY_ATMOS
 THREE_D
 FOUR_DX
}

enum SeatCategory {
 REGULAR
 PREMIUM
 VIP
 RECLINER
}

enum SeatStatus {
 AVAILABLE
 BLOCKED
 BOOKED
}

enum BookingStatus {
 PENDING
 CONFIRMED
 CANCELLED
 EXPIRED
}

enum PaymentMethod {
 CREDIT_CARD
 DEBIT_CARD
 UPI
 NET_BANKING
 WALLET
}

enum PaymentStatus {
 PENDING
 SUCCESS
 FAILED
 REFUNDED
}

enum UserRole {
 CUSTOMER
 ADMIN
 THEATER_OWNER
}

' ===== RELATIONSHIPS =====

Theater \"1\" *-- \"*\" Screen : contains
Screen \"1\" *-- \"*\" Seat : has
Screen \"1\" *-- \"*\" Show : hosts
Movie \"1\" *-- \"*\" Show : shown in

Show \"1\" *-- \"*\" ShowSeat : has
Seat \"1\" -- \"*\" ShowSeat : linked to
ShowSeat \"*\" --o \"1\" Booking : belongs to

User \"1\" *-- \"*\" Booking : makes
Show \"1\" -- \"*\" Booking : for
Booking \"1\" -- \"0..1\" Payment : paid by

Screen ..> ScreenType
Seat ..> SeatCategory
ShowSeat ..> SeatStatus
Booking ..> BookingStatus
Payment ..> PaymentMethod
Payment ..> PaymentStatus
User ..> UserRole

@enduml

",
 "format": "png"
}" id="6vH42XDeX_oHI80BPV8k-5"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/png,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="1768" width="770" x="80" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
